standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per positive state episode

database_mapping.source_grain: one reviewed vasoactive parent course interval row before support-episode union
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained positive vasopressor-support state episode row

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patient-level identifier from reviewed vasoactive foundation and trusted stay map
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: hospital-admission-level identifier from reviewed vasoactive foundation and trusted stay map
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: ICU-stay-level identifier from reviewed vasoactive foundation and trusted stay map

adjacent_status_boundary.boundary_reason: This same-name variable represents any vasopressor-capable support active, not agent-specific detail, equivalent-dose exposure, inotrope-only therapy, shock phenotype, or free-day outcome.

state_episode_build_translation.positive_state_translation: retain reviewed vasoactive parent course intervals with vasoactive_rate_analysis_eligible=true and role class in vasopressor or mixed_pressor_inotrope
state_episode_build_translation.episode_start_translation: use merged support_starttime after unioning eligible parent course intervals within stay
state_episode_build_translation.episode_end_translation: use merged support_endtime after unioning eligible parent course intervals within stay
state_episode_build_translation.continuity_translation: merge only overlapping or exactly contiguous eligible parent course intervals; any positive gap starts a new support episode
state_episode_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a retained row means no positive vasopressor-support episode under this source-role rule

validation_contract.positive_only_no_row_policy_check: false rows are not emitted; absence of row is not universal proof of no vasopressor support or no shock
notes: The retained source is the reviewed local std_icu_vasoactive_medication_infusion_event foundation.
Opening v1 includes role classes vasopressor and mixed_pressor_inotrope.
Pure inotrope and pure inodilator rows are excluded from the default numerator.
The asset is support-state truth only and is not septic-shock truth by itself.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint should read this mapping spec and delegate to the current local reviewed implementation until a more fully spec-native runner replaces it.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_vasopressor_support_active outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path rather than side SQL or ad hoc rebuilds.
